subject: docs(claude-md): align shared sections with glow-props scaffolding
body:
`align` trigger found six drift items vs glow-props/CLAUDE.md:

- Communication: add "Work, not process." rule — no opining on
  branching/PRs/git history/review flow.
- Code Standards: add "Timer and Subscription Cleanup" subsection
  covering cleanup pairing, React/plain-module patterns, and HMR-safe
  listener guards. Relevant here — BottomSheet drag timers, BurgerMenu
  close-then-act delay, PWA hook listeners, debug log subscribers.
- AI Notes: prepend "All code is yours." and add
  "Discontinued repos — skip entirely" (plant-fur, coin-zapp).
- Prohibitions: add three process-related bans (branch/PR mentions,
  "out of scope" framing, editorializing on git history/PR shape).
- Dedupe: remove verbatim-duplicated "DaisyUI component classes for
  form inputs" bullet introduced in a prior merge.

Canva-grid-specific sections (Project Info, Architecture, State
Structure, Tab Details, Style Guide doc entry) preserved.

Tags: docs, claude-md, alignment, glow-props, fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
